issues.detail: Instructions lack step-by-step guidance, making it unclear how to create workflows beyond the example.
Skill does not address error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.
Skill contains verbose explanatory text that exceeds necessary instructions.

scenarios.name: Create a parameterized Warp Workflow for deploying a service
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes a YAML file under ~/.warp/workflows/ with name/description/tags/command using {{variables}} and an arguments list with description/default_value as documented; baseline produces a generic shell script with no Warp Workflow schema.

scenarios.name: Configure a multi-tab launch configuration for full-stack dev
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes ~/.warp/launch_configurations.yaml with a configurations list, each entry having tabs with title/directory/command per the SKILL.md format; baseline lacks the launch_configurations file structure and falls back to tmux or aliases.
